news.t: Aerospace and defense ETFs beat S&P 500 as Middle East fears intensify
First Trust Launches First Trust Indxx Aerospace & Defense ETF

holdings.infoBox: MISL is an equity ETF with a total of 40 individual holdings. The top holdings are GE Aerospace stock at 8.69%, The Boeing Company at 8.05%, Palantir Technologies at 7.99%, RTX Corporation at 7.28%, and Lockheed Martin at 7.03%.

overview.description: The First Trust Indxx Aerospace & Defense ETF (MISL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Indxx US Aerospace & Defense index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of 50 US companies involved in advanced and traditional aerospace and defense. MISL was launched on Oct 25, 2022 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Aerospace and defense ETFs beat S&P 500 as Middle East fears intensify
data.text: Aerospace and defense ETFs have surged in the past year — and are up so far this week even as the U.S. stock market has broadly stumbled.

data.title: First Trust Launches First Trust Indxx Aerospace & Defense ETF
data.text: First Trust Advisors L.P. (“First Trust”), a leading exchange-traded fund (“ETF”) provider and asset manager, announced today that it has launched a new ETF, the First Trust Indxx Aerospace & Defense ...
